title: chrysanthemum indicum var. aromaticum
intro: Chrysanthemum indicum var. aromaticum, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum indicum var. aromaticum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. Chrysanthemum indicum var. aromaticum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to enhance its medicinal effects.
